name: Mechanistic Attention Guidance for Agent Memory Refinement
summary: arXiv:2607.17621v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Existing self-evolving memory systems mainly improve agent memory based on textual outputs, such as task trajectories and reflections. However, this...
description: arXiv:2607.17621v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Existing self-evolving memory systems mainly improve agent memory based on textual outputs, such as task trajectories and reflections. However, this text-based paradigm rarely incorporates internal mechanistic signals, leaving how retrieved memory is actually utilized during task execution underexplored. This limitation can lead to unreliable erro...
author: Yechao Hong, Haiquan Qiu, Yaqing Wang, Quanming Yao
